prompt: A realistic corporate office photo of a young man seated indoors, holding up a printed research paper toward the camera with both hands. His face is fully obscured by a solid rectangular censor block in a medium tan color. He has short dark brown hair and wears a plain dark charcoal crewneck sweater. The paper is a white letter-size document in portrait orientation, clearly visible and centered in front of his torso. The document title reads “DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems”. Below it are the author lines “DFlash Research Team” and “DFlash Inc.” The page shows 4 visible text sections: “Abstract”, “1. Introduction”, “2. DFlash Technology Overview”, and “2.1 Dual Charge-Trapping Architecture”, set in a formal academic paper layout with dense black serif text. In the background, place a softly blurred modern office lobby with warm ambient lighting, beige walls, glass partitions, a sofa, indoor plants, and the black OpenAI logo and wordmark mounted on the wall at upper left. The composition is a medium shot, straight-on, with the subject slightly right of center so the OpenAI logo remains visible. Shallow depth of field, soft natural office lighting, polished photorealistic style, subtle warm color grading, high detail in the hands, paper, sweater texture, and interior environment. Keep the overall image clean, believable, and like a candid press or announcement photo. Use {argument name="document title" default="DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems"} for the paper title, {argument name="company logo text" default="OpenAI"} for the wall branding, {argument name="sweater color" default="dark charcoal"} for the subject’s clothing, and {argument name="censor block color" default="medium tan"} for the face covering.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实的职场办公室照片，一名年轻男子坐在室内，双手将一份打印的研究论文举向镜头。他的脸部被一个中棕色的实心矩形遮挡块完全遮住。他留着深棕色短发，身穿一件纯色深炭灰色圆领毛衣。手中的论文是一份纵向的白色信纸大小文档，清晰可见并位于躯干前方中央。文档标题为“DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems”。下方是作者行“DFlash Research Team”和“DFlash Inc.”。页面显示 4 个可见文本部分：“Abstract”、“1. Introduction”、“2. DFlash Technology Overview”和“2.1 Dual Charge-Trapping Architecture”，采用正式的学术论文排版，配以密集的黑色衬线字体。背景为柔和模糊的现代办公室大厅，配有温暖的环境光、米色墙壁、玻璃隔断、沙发、室内植物，左上角墙上安装有黑色的 OpenAI 标志和文字标识。构图为中景直拍，主体略微偏向右侧，以便 OpenAI 标志保持可见。浅景深，柔和的自然办公光线，精致的照片级写实风格，微妙的暖色调，手部、纸张、毛衣纹理和室内环境细节丰富。保持整体画面整洁、可信，呈现出抓拍的新闻或公告照片效果。使用 {argument name="document title" default="DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems"} 作为论文标题，{argument name="company logo text" default="OpenAI"} 作为墙面品牌标识，{argument name="sweater color" default="dark charcoal"} 作为主体服装颜色，以及 {argument name="censor block color" default="medium tan"} 作为面部遮挡块颜色。

breakdown.creativeCore: 经过审查的研究论文办公室肖像：此提示词可生成一张照片级逼真的办公室公告风格肖像，画面中一名男子手持技术论文，背景可见公司品牌标识，适用于科技新闻、恶搞公告或企业社论配图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
